steps.title: Spot the time reference
steps.content: The phrase from 1440 to 1473 identifies a specific, completed historical period in the past.

steps.title: Apply the correct tense
steps.content:
Simple past tense is required for completed actions in a specific past time period. Was ruled correctly uses the past auxiliary verb in passive voice. The other choices use present, future, or present perfect tense, which violate the requirement to express a completed action in a definite past period.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
